/usr/bin/ar qc libahfl_compiler_syntax.a CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_syntax.dir/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_syntax.dir/ast_printer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_syntax.dir/desugar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_syntax.dir/frontend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_syntax.dir/project.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libahfl_compiler_syntax.a
